pkgmetadata.longdescription: vvmPypi Status Build Status Coverage StatusVyper version management tool.Installation------------via pip.. code bash pip install vvmvia setuptools.. code bash git clone httpsgithub.comvyperlangvvm.git cd vvm python3 setup.py installTesting-------vvm is tested on Linux, OSX and Windows with Vyper versions0.1.0-beta.16.To run the test suite.. code bash pytest testsBy default, the test suite installs all available vyper versions foryour OS. If you only wish to test against already installed versions,include the --no-install flag. Use the --vyper-verions flag totest against one or more specific versions.Contributing------------Help is always appreciated Feel free to open an issue if you find aproblem, or a pull request if youve solved an issue.Please check out our Contribution Guide CONTRIBUTING.md__ prior toopening a pull request.License-------This project is licensed under the MIT license LICENSE__... Pypi Status image httpsimg.shields.iopypivvvm.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectvvm.. Build Status image httpsimg.shields.iogithubworkflowstatusvyperlangvvmvvm20workflow target httpsgithub.comvyperlangvvmactions.. Coverage Status image httpsimg.shields.iocodecovcgithubvyperlangvvm target httpscodecov.ioghvyperlangvvm
